name: Croutons
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine the salt, basil, oregano, black pepper, olive oil, and Fat Free Spread.
3. Brush one side of each bread slice with the oil mixture.
4. Stack the bread slices and cut into cubes.
5. Spread the cubes in a single layer on a baking sheet.
6. Bake until dry and crisp.
